meaning: n.王冠,花冠,顶vt.加冕,顶上有,表彰,使圆满完成
examples: She is determined to retain her Wimbledon crown.
The crown was set with precious jewels—diamonds, rubies and emeralds.
Between 1987 and 1990, Steffi Graf largely held off Navratilova's challenge for the crown.
It also sold 100, 000 Mercury Grand Marquis versus the Ford Crown Victoria, with 109, 000 sales.
Currently sworn police officers are servants of the Crown, not employees, so they cannot be made redundant.
